Requirement_Summary: Classify all data assets based on sensitivity and regulatory requirements
Evidence_Examples: Sensitivity label usage reports, classification audit
Implementation_Guidance: Create labels: Public > General > Confidential > Highly Confidential with encryption

Requirement_Summary: Prevent unauthorized sharing of sensitive data across communication channels
Implementation_Guidance: Create Purview DLP policy detecting PII across Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Endpoints

Requirement_Summary: Encrypt sensitive data and apply classification labels automatically
Implementation_Guidance: Configure auto-labeling conditions for credit card numbers and PII

Requirement_Summary: Retain data for required periods per regulatory mandates; dispose securely after
Implementation_Guidance: Create retention label with 7-year keep and delete action; mark as regulatory record

Requirement_Summary: Protect financial data from unauthorized access and sharing
Implementation_Guidance: Create DLP policy detecting financial data (credit cards, IBAN, SWIFT)

Requirement_Summary: Maintain regulatory records with immutable retention
Implementation_Guidance: Create retention label with 10-year retention; mark as regulatory record (cannot relabel)

Requirement_Summary: Implement secure disposition of records after retention period
Implementation_Guidance: Configure retention labels with keepAndDelete action and disposition review

Requirement_Summary: Place legal holds on relevant content for investigations
Evidence_Examples: eDiscovery case reports, hold audit logs
Implementation_Guidance: Create eDiscovery cases with custodians and non-custodial data sources

Requirement_Summary: Enable content search across M365 services for compliance investigations
Evidence_Examples: Search result exports, review set audit
Implementation_Guidance: Configure eDiscovery search queries and review sets

Requirement_Summary: Restrict communication between specific groups for regulatory compliance
Implementation_Guidance: Create information barrier policies between departments

Requirement_Summary: Establish data governance policies for data lifecycle management
Implementation_Guidance: Create retention policies covering all M365 locations with appropriate periods

Requirement_Summary: Monitor and report on compliance posture across data governance controls
Implementation_Guidance: Deploy sensitivity labels and monitor adoption via Activity Explorer and Content Explorer

Requirement_Summary: Maintain comprehensive audit trail for all data access and modifications
Implementation_Guidance: Create retention policy for audit logs with 1-year retention period
